overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical coastal settlement. The character walks from a wooden dock across sandy beaches past tribal tents and a large shipwreck, then continues along a wooden path into dense tropical jungle. The environment features bright sunlight, turquoise water, and a mix of constructed wooden structures with lush natural vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway along turquoise water

events.description: character steps off wooden dock planks onto sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock past NPCs toward the beach settlement

notable_agents.action: NPC in white shirt walking alongside the dock
NPC standing near dock edge looking at water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with rope railings
clear tropical water with white foam along the shoreline
wooden canopy structure providing partial cover over the dock
stacked wooden crates and barrels on the dockside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock walkway with weathered planks, following the character as she walks past NPCs and cargo crates. The turquoise ocean is visible to the right, and the dock has partial wooden roofing. Around 8 seconds, the character steps off the dock onto the sandy beach, transitioning from the wooden deck to open sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach area with central tribal tent structure

events.description: approaching the large central tribal tent with decorative banners

agents.ego_description: walking across the white sandy beach toward the large tribal tent structure

notable_agents.action: child NPC running across the sand toward the tent

entered.detail: white sandy beach surface with footprints and scattered debris
large beige canvas tent with wooden poles and green decorative patterns
tall wooden poles with colorful red and green fabric banners
dense group of tropical palm trees surrounding the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open sandy beach toward a large tribal tent structure with decorative banners. Palm trees surround the settlement area, and the ocean remains visible in the distance. The lighting is bright and direct, with full sky visibility overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement plaza with market stalls and beached shipwreck

events.description: turning toward the large shipwreck beached on the sand
character turns right to face the shipwreck then continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking around the settlement plaza, turning to view the large shipwreck and market area

notable_agents.action: NPC walking toward the shipwreck area

entered.detail: massive wooden sailing ship with tattered sails and broken masts beached on the sand
wooden market stalls with canvas canopies displaying goods
tall decorated wooden totem with green and red geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The character explores the central settlement plaza, turning to reveal a massive shipwreck with tattered sails beached on the right side. Market stalls with canvas canopies line the left side of the path, and a tall decorated totem pole stands in the distance. The camera turns right to focus on the shipwreck before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway through tropical palm grove leaving settlement

events.description: leaving the open settlement, entering the palm tree jungle path

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden plank path into the denser tropical jungle area away from the settlement

notable_agents.action: NPC walking ahead on the wooden path into the jungle

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a raised walkway through the sandy jungle floor
dense green bushes and flowering plants with large leaves
large stone outcrops and cliff faces rising behind the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main settlement behind, transitioning onto a wooden plank path that winds through dense tropical vegetation. The lighting becomes slightly diffused as palm tree canopy provides partial shade. Large rock formations become visible in the distance to the left, and the path leads deeper into the jungle.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow jungle trail with dense tropical vegetation

events.description: slight turn left as the path curves through the dense jungle

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding wooden path deeper into the tropical jungle with dense canopy overhead

entered.detail: dense overhead cover of palm fronds and tropical tree canopy creating dappled shade
small thatched roof structure partially visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking deeper into the narrow jungle path, with dense tropical vegetation enclosing the trail. The wooden planks continue underfoot while the jungle canopy creates a partially shaded environment. The path curves slightly left as it progresses toward distant rock formations and a small wooden hut visible through the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open coastal settlement into the shaded depths of a tropical jungle. It begins on a weathered wooden dock walkway beside a turquoise ocean, following the character as she steps off the planks and onto a sun-drenched sandy beach. As she moves through the settlement, the scene opens up to reveal decorative tribal tents and market stalls before turning toward a massive, beached shipwreck with tattered sails. The camera then shifts away from the open plaza, transitioning onto a winding wooden path where the bright sunlight becomes diffused by a thickening canopy of palm trees. Finally, the environment closes in as the character walks deeper into the dense jungle vegetation, following the curving trail toward distant rock formations and a secluded wooden hut.
